templates.name: React + Vite (Batteries Included)
templates.description: Production-ready Vite + React 19 with TanStack Router, Zustand, Vitest, Playwright, and Tailwind CSS.
templates.long_description: Clean architecture following bulletproof-react patterns. Includes TanStack Router (file-based), TanStack Query, Zustand state management, Nivo charts, react-i18next, Vitest unit tests, Playwright E2E tests, Husky + Commitlint. Monthly dependency updates.

templates.name: React + Vite + shadcn/ui
templates.description: Minimal React starter with Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind, and shadcn/ui component library.
templates.long_description: Uses the official Vite scaffolding plus shadcn/ui initialization. Always up to date because it's generated from the latest CLI versions. Closest to what Lovable.dev outputs. Includes the cn() utility for class merging.

templates.name: Next.js Full-Stack
templates.description: Production-ready Next.js 16 with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, Drizzle ORM, Auth, Testing, and CI/CD.
templates.long_description: The gold standard Next.js boilerplate. Most-starred on GitHub. Includes ESLint, Prettier, Husky, Commitlint, Vitest, Playwright, Storybook, and Sentry. Local PGlite database — no external DB needed for development. Auth via Clerk. Monthly dependency updates.

templates.name: Next.js SaaS Boilerplate
templates.description: Full-featured SaaS starter with Stripe payments, multi-tenancy, roles, and team management.
templates.long_description: Same maintainer as the flagship Next.js boilerplate. Adds SaaS essentials: Stripe subscription billing, multi-tenancy, team management, roles/permissions, user impersonation. Includes shadcn/ui, Drizzle ORM, Clerk Auth, Vitest, Playwright. Free tier is fully functional.

templates.name: next-forge (Monorepo)
templates.description: Production-grade Next.js monorepo with Turborepo, Prisma, Clerk, and Stripe.
templates.long_description: Monorepo architecture using Turborepo. Separates apps, packages, and API. Production-ready with Radix UI, Prisma ORM, Clerk auth, Stripe payments, Sentry monitoring, Vitest, Playwright. Good for larger projects that need multi-app structure.

templates.name: FastAPI Full-Stack (Official)
templates.description: Official FastAPI template by Tiangolo with React frontend, SQLModel, PostgreSQL, and Docker.
templates.long_description: The reference full-stack FastAPI template, maintained by the FastAPI creator. Docker-based dev environment with PostgreSQL. Includes React frontend, SQLModel ORM, Alembic migrations, GitHub Actions CI/CD, Traefik reverse proxy with automatic HTTPS. Frontend API client auto-generated from OpenAPI spec.

templates.name: FastAPI Boilerplate
templates.description: Production-proven FastAPI with async SQLAlchemy, Redis, ARQ job queues, and rate limiting.
templates.long_description: Battle-tested in production. Includes async SQLAlchemy 2.0, Pydantic V2, PostgreSQL with Alembic migrations, Redis caching, ARQ background job queue, tier-based rate limiting, JWT auth with token blacklisting. Uses modern uv package manager. Active Discord community.
templates.prerequisites: Requires uv package manager (install: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh)

templates.name: Astro (Static Site)
templates.description: Official Astro scaffolding for blazing-fast content sites, blogs, and documentation.
templates.long_description: Official Astro CLI scaffolding with TypeScript. Static-first with island architecture — renders to HTML by default, adds JavaScript only where needed. Perfect for content sites, blogs, documentation, and marketing pages. Supports React, Vue, or Svelte islands.

templates.name: Expo (React Native)
templates.description: Official Expo scaffolding for cross-platform iOS, Android, and web apps.
templates.long_description: Official Expo CLI scaffolding with TypeScript. File-based routing via Expo Router. Build cross-platform mobile apps that run on iOS, Android, and web from a single codebase. Always uses the latest Expo SDK.

templates.name: Nextplate (Website + Blog)
templates.description: General-purpose Next.js + Tailwind website template with built-in blog, dark mode, and CMS integration.
templates.long_description: A low-barrier Next.js starter for marketing sites, landing pages, and blogs. Includes 15+ pre-built pages, multi-author blog with MDX, dark mode via next-themes, SEO with next-sitemap, Disqus comments, i18n support, and Tailwind CSS 4. Simple and approachable — no complex auth or database setup needed.
